SwiftUI E-Commerce Payments

Nykaa (Beauty)

Built and delivered features for Nykaa's high-traffic consumer e-commerce iOS application. Contributed to the gradual migration from UIKit to SwiftUI, implemented a dual UI architecture using feature flags, and delivered the end-to-end payment flow for the Nike India iOS app.

The Challenge

Nykaa's beauty e-commerce platform serves millions of users with a vast catalog of products. The challenge was to modernize the iOS app with SwiftUI while maintaining backward compatibility, and to integrate complex payment flows that handle multiple payment gateways securely and reliably.

Key Contributions

  • UIKit to SwiftUI Migration: Led the gradual migration from UIKit to SwiftUI, implementing a dual UI architecture that allows feature-flag-driven rollout of new SwiftUI screens.
  • End-to-End Payment Flow: Delivered the complete payment integration for the Nike India iOS app, supporting multiple payment gateways including UPI, cards, and wallets.
  • Feature Flag Architecture: Built a robust feature flag system enabling safe, incremental rollout of UI changes without disrupting the user experience.
  • Firebase Integration: Implemented analytics, remote configuration, and A/B testing using Firebase to optimize conversion funnels.
  • Deep Link Handling: Built a comprehensive deep linking system for marketing campaigns, push notifications, and cross-app navigation.

Tech Stack

SwiftUI

Modern declarative UI framework

UIKit

Legacy UI with bridging to SwiftUI

Payments SDK

Multi-gateway payment integration

Firebase

Analytics, remote config, A/B testing

Deep Links

Universal links and URL scheme handling

Combine

Reactive data flow and state management
